statements.sql: WITH active_products AS (SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS ProductAlternateKey, ProductName AS EnglishProductName FROM bronze.Product WHERE SellEndDate IS NULL) INSERT INTO silver.SingleCteTarget (ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName) SELECT ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName FROM active_products

refactor.extracted_sql: WITH active_products AS ( SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS ProductAlternateKey, ProductName AS EnglishProductName FROM bronze.Product WHERE SellEndDate IS NULL ) SELECT ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName FROM active_products
refactor.refactored_sql: WITH import AS ( SELECT ProductID, ProductName, SellEndDate FROM bronze.Product ), logical AS ( SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS ProductAlternateKey, ProductName AS EnglishProductName FROM import WHERE SellEndDate IS NULL ), final AS ( SELECT ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName FROM logical ) SELECT * FROM final

source_tables.summary: Both SQLs read from bronze.Product as the sole source table

output_columns.summary: Both SQLs produce identical output columns: ProductAlternateKey (NVARCHAR(25)) and EnglishProductName

joins.summary: No joins present in either SQL; not applicable

filters.summary: Both SQLs apply the same filter: WHERE SellEndDate IS NULL

aggregation_grain.summary: Both SQLs produce the same row grain - one row per Product where SellEndDate IS NULL, with no aggregation
